economic_notes: Nation has investments in Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings Limited Partnership, Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., and 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. (meat shop, gravel operations). COVID-19 noted as significant event with expected negative impact on First Nations Trust funding due to SIGA casino closures. Treaty Benefit Claim initiated against Government of Canada in 2018.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Nation is in SK (Treaty 6 Territory). Auditor emphasis of matter paragraph regarding Treaty Benefit Claim loan of $985,579 against Government of Canada. Change in reporting entity: 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. reclassified from consolidated to modified equity method during year. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings LP, Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. Five entities fully consolidated. Poundmaker Legacy Trust excluded (not controlled). Nation not in compliance with RBC covenant requiring audited financials within 150 days of year-end. COVID-19 significant event disclosed. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $9,801,156 + CMHC $223,616 = $10,024,772. osr = $12,076,507 - $10,024,772 = $2,051,735. Prior year included Treaty Annuities settlement of $4,828,055 and related expenses of $4,315,007 as other items.
